task_completion.description: The agent opened and viewed the open enrollment memo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer window displaying the contents of 'open_enrollment_2026.txt' containing employee and dependent details.

task_completion.description: The agent added John Mitchell as a dependent for EMP002.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo HRMS interface showing 'John Mitchell' (DOB: 1985-04-12) successfully added to the dependents list or being submitted in the dependent form for EMP002.

task_completion.description: The agent added Emma Taylor as a dependent for EMP007.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo HRMS interface showing 'Emma Taylor' (DOB: 2020-08-30) successfully added to the dependents list or being submitted in the dependent form for EMP007 (Note: Employee name may appear as Robert Patel in the system).

task_completion.description: The agent added Noah Taylor as a dependent for EMP007.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo HRMS interface showing 'Noah Taylor' (DOB: 2022-11-15) successfully added to the dependents list or being submitted in the dependent form for EMP007.

task_completion.description: The agent added Alex Rivera as a dependent for EMP019.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo HRMS interface showing 'Alex Rivera' (DOB: 1990-02-28) successfully added to the dependents list or being submitted in the dependent form for EMP019.

task_completion.description: The agent correctly ignored the invalid dependent entry for EMP001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify across all screenshots that the agent NEVER submits a dependent form for 'Buster Anderson' under EMP001. If there is any screenshot showing Buster Anderson being added to the HRMS, this item should be marked as failed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Sentrifugo HRMS via the web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Sentrifugo web interface in a browser to add dependents, rather than using terminal commands like curl or python scripts to send API requests.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent using a MySQL client or terminal to execute SQL INSERT statements directly into the Sentrifugo database.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual HRMS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data entry must happen within the Sentrifugo web forms, not just typed into a dummy text file or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Expected dependents to be added in Sentrifugo HRMS:
- EMP002: John Mitchell (DOB: 1985-04-12)
- EMP007: Emma Taylor (DOB: 2020-08-30) and Noah Taylor (DOB: 2022-11-15). Note: EMP007 is listed as 'Robert Taylor' in the memo but is 'Robert Patel' in the database.
- EMP019: Alex Rivera (DOB: 1990-02-28)
Negative constraint: EMP001 (Buster Anderson) is an invalid entry and must NOT be added as a dependent.
